overall.description: Static shot of a futuristic cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night, featuring a messy bed in the foreground, checkered wall paneling, and a panoramic city view through large windows. The scene remains completely still with no camera movement or action throughout the clip, characteristic of game engine footage from a title like Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary first-person perspective observing the bedroom interior and cityscape outside

entered.detail: unmade bed with rumpled sheets and pillows in the immediate foreground
dark checkered acoustic paneling covering the left wall
floor-to-ceiling window revealing dark cityscape outside
distant neon lights and building illumination visible through the window
rectangular overhead light fixture emitting warm white light
tall shelving unit against the checkered wall with various items
low industrial-style table near the window
warm ambient light source near the window area

segments.scene_description: A static view of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night. The camera remains fixed on an unmade bed in the foreground, with a distinctive checkered wall to the left and a large panoramic window revealing a dark, neon-lit cityscape in the distance. The room features mixed lighting from a ceiling fixture and ambient floor lighting, creating a moody, atmospheric environment typical of high-end game engine rendering. No movement or changes occur throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric gaze over a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom that remains frozen in a moody nocturnal state. It begins with a fixed focus on an unmade bed in the foreground, framed by a distinctive checkered wall to the left. As the eye wanders, the interior space blends ceiling fixtures with ambient floor lighting to establish a heavy, cinematic mood. The scene then opens up toward a large panoramic window, revealing a dark, neon-lit cityscape that stretches into the distance. This stillness persists throughout the view, keeping the high-end rendering of the futuristic apartment perfectly poised against the glowing urban horizon.
